name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Simple accordion
description: FAQ section with accordion interaction with one-question-at-a-time expansion.

name: Bordered cards
description: FAQ section with separate bordered question cards with clearer item boundaries.

name: With background
description: FAQ section with faq block on a contrasting background panel.

name: Static
description: FAQ section with non-collapsible static answers displayed without interaction.

name: Grid
description: FAQ section with multi-column faq item grid instead of a single stacked list.
